meta.source: synthetic preview seed — run `npm run data:asx-removed` with an ASX removed-companies CSV

tickers.name: Fairy-Wren Robotics Limited
tickers.detail: Delisted at the request of the entity under Listing Rule 17.11.

tickers.name: Mulga Copper Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following compulsory acquisition by Sample Resources plc.

tickers.name: Galah Retail Group Limited
tickers.detail: Delisted at the entity's request under Listing Rule 17.11.

tickers.name: Kookaburra Software Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following scheme of arrangement with Sample Tech Corp.

tickers.name: Banksia Therapeutics Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following appointment of voluntary administrators.

tickers.name: Eucalypt Infrastructure Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following scheme of arrangement with Sample Infra Partners.

tickers.name: Grevillea Agriculture Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following compulsory acquisition by Sample Agri Pty Ltd.

tickers.name: Quokka Energy Limited
tickers.detail: Delisted at the request of the company under Listing Rule 17.11.

tickers.name: Huon Aquaculture Holdings NL
tickers.detail: Removed following compulsory acquisition by Sample Foods International.

tickers.name: Melaleuca Health Limited
tickers.detail: Delisted at the request of the company.

tickers.name: Currawong Media Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following successful takeover offer by Sample Media Group.

tickers.name: Quandong Foods Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following compulsory acquisition by Sample FMCG Limited.

tickers.name: Telopea Resources Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following compulsory acquisition by Sample Holdings Limited.

tickers.name: Ironbark Infrastructure Limited
tickers.detail: Change of name — now known as Eucalypt Infrastructure Limited (EUC).

tickers.name: Jacaranda Property Group
tickers.detail: Removed following stapling restructure by scheme of arrangement.

tickers.name: Waratah Biotech Limited
tickers.detail: Name change — renamed to Banksia Therapeutics Limited (BKT).

tickers.name: Bunya Infrastructure Trust
tickers.detail: Removed following merger by scheme of arrangement with Ironbark Infrastructure (IRB).

tickers.name: Spinifex Logistics Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following successful off-market takeover by Sample Freight Group.

tickers.name: Lyrebird Communications Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following implementation of scheme of arrangement with Currawong Media Limited.

tickers.name: Pandani Minerals NL
tickers.detail: Delisted for failure to comply with Listing Rule 12.1 (level of operations).

tickers.name: Numbat Gold NL
tickers.detail: Delisted for failure to pay annual listing fees.

tickers.name: Casuarina Telecom Limited
tickers.detail: Removed following merger with Sample Telco via scheme of arrangement.

tickers.name: Nullarbor Transport Limited
tickers.detail: Name change — renamed to Spinifex Logistics Limited (SPX).

tickers.name: Boab Mining NL
tickers.detail: Securities suspended; company wound up following appointment of liquidators.

tickers.name: Dingo Exploration Limited
tickers.detail: Deregistered by ASIC; securities removed from official list.

tickers.name: Lilly Pilly Wines Limited
tickers.detail: Receivers and managers appointed; subsequently removed from the official list.

tickers.name: Rosella Financial Group
tickers.detail: Securities suspended; company placed into liquidation.

tickers.name: Bilby Pharmaceuticals NL
tickers.detail: Wound up by order of the court; removed from official list.
